case_title: TUCKER, SUZANNE DBA ONE STOP GRAPHICS VS KALAVERAS, ANGELO DBA ANATOLE PUBLISHING CO.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO ANGELO KALAVERAS RETURNED SIGNED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KALAVERAS, ANGELO DBA ANATOLE PUBLISHING CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUCKER, SUZANNE DBA ONE STOP GRAPHICS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KALAVERAS, ANGELO DBA ANATOLE PUBLISHING CO. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $776.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KALAVERAS, ANGELO DBA ANATOLE PUBLISHING CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT TUCKER, SUZANNE DBA ONE STOP GRAPHICS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
